_comment: Scene-based maps loop. PixelLab DRAWS each loading-zone screen (create-image-pixflux), art-directed with a palette reference for a cohesive Grave Seasons look. Terrain is NOT tiled and props are NOT generated here — props come from the objects agent (/objects). Each zone = maps/<id>/ with scene.png (background), zone.json (collision + y-sorted entities + exits + spawn + camera), preview.png. See maps/README.md.
style_base: Grave Seasons style, cohesive top-down RPG pixel art, painterly dithered shading, warm cohesive palette, soft daylight

budget._comment: Shared PixelLab pool (coordination/PROTOCOL.md); maps floor 2000 so it never starves characters/objects.

scale._comment: A character reads at ~20% of screen height; props sized relative to the character (see pipeline/proportions.py). Objects come from the objects agent at their placement scale.

_prop_scale: Per-prop size as a multiple of the on-map character height (a tree ~1.3x a character, a chest ~0.45x). Ids must exist in /objects (the objects agent's catalog).
_zones: Each zone is one drawn screen. `prompt` art-directs the scene; `props` are placed on a y-sorted layer near the clearing edge; `exits` link screens into a bigger explorable island.

zones.title: Isle of Dawn
zones.prompt: Grave Seasons style top-down map of a whole small island seen from directly above, blue ocean water around all edges, sandy beaches, a lush grassy interior with a winding dirt path, a small pond, scattered trees, bushes and wildflowers, cohesive warm palette, soft painterly pixel-art shading, the ocean fills every edge so it tiles seamlessly with surrounding sea

zones.title: Verdant Isle
zones.prompt: Grave Seasons style top-down map of a whole small island seen from directly above, blue ocean water around all edges, sandy shores, a dense forest interior of many trees with clearings, a stream and a dirt trail, ferns and mushrooms, cohesive warm palette, soft painterly pixel-art shading, the ocean fills every edge so it tiles seamlessly with surrounding sea

zones.title: Sunny Atoll
zones.prompt: Grave Seasons style top-down map of a whole small island seen from directly above, blue ocean water around all edges, wide pale sandy beaches, a small palmy grass interior, turquoise shallows, a few rocks and driftwood, cohesive warm palette, soft painterly pixel-art shading, the ocean fills every edge so it tiles seamlessly with surrounding sea

zones.title: Stonewatch Isle
zones.prompt: Grave Seasons style top-down map of a whole small island seen from directly above, blue ocean water around all edges, rocky shores, a grassy interior with grey stone outcrops and overgrown ancient ruins, a dirt path, cohesive warm palette, soft painterly pixel-art shading, the ocean fills every edge so it tiles seamlessly with surrounding sea

zones.title: Hollow Cave
zones.prompt: Grave Seasons style top-down interior map, a rocky cave chamber with a stone floor and jagged rock walls around the edges, torchlit mood, cohesive palette, soft painterly pixel-art shading

zones.title: Fisher's Cabin
zones.prompt: Grave Seasons style top-down interior map, a cozy one-room wooden cabin, warm plank floor, wooden walls around the edges, a rug in the middle, cohesive palette, soft painterly pixel-art shading

templates.title: Wild Isle
templates.prompt: Grave Seasons style top-down map of a whole small wild island seen from directly above, blue ocean around all edges, sandy beaches, a grassy interior with trees, bushes, wildflowers and a winding dirt path, the ocean fills every edge to tile with surrounding sea, cohesive palette, soft painterly shading

templates.title: Sandy Isle
templates.prompt: Grave Seasons style top-down map of a whole small tropical sandy island seen from directly above, turquoise ocean around all edges, wide pale beaches, a few palms and grass, rocks and driftwood, the ocean fills every edge to tile with surrounding sea, cohesive palette, soft painterly shading
